title: Omnis' Enchantments
description: A complete reimagining of enchanted items: new glint, outline, glow, runic particles, dynamic lights, and more. Make your enchantments feel truly magical!
body:
--- ![Tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/416830e8f26c2fc446b34e8f0b2810a6a083dde4.png) --- ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a18ec7c4cb182fe1254c515ace7c02fc9bde664.png)
Accessibility **Required:** - [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) - [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) - [Transparency Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/transparency-fix") - [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) # Omnis Enchantments Give your enchanted items an **aura of magical power!** # Features - **Outline** and **Glow Effect** for every enchanted item - **Runic Particles** around the item - **Dynamic Light:** enchanted items emit 8 levels of light; items enchanted with Fire Aspect, Channeling or Flame emit 10 - New **Glint** for items and armor - **3D Arrow** in bow and crossbow pulling animation - Compatible with **Classic Tools Fusion** # Customization - **Toggle** Glow Effect per item type - **Toggle** Runic Particles per item type - **Toggle** Outline per item type - **Toggle** Custom Model per item type - **Toggle** Dynamic Light - **Toggle** Directional Light - Adjust **Glow Intensity** - Adjust **Runic Particles Intensity** - 4 Glint options for items: **Reworked**, **Vanilla**, **Minimal**, and **No Glint** - 3 Glint options for armor: **Reworked**, **Vanilla**, and **No Glint**
